prompt:
A 500 W three-blade wind turbine stands on a short mast, guyed and bolted to a roof curb. Heavy DC cables run neatly into a weatherproof charge controller box mounted beside a 200 Wh battery pack, with a small brake switch labeled by a colored cap. A digital multimeter rests nearby showing healthy voltage, and all cables are strain-relieved and fused.

Depict a bright, breezy, near-future solarpunk rooftop with planters and solar panels in soft focus. The composition should be 512×512, photorealistic, with no logos or readable text, keeping focus on the properly wired turbine, controller, and battery.
